backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all core data types (quotations, projects, reviews, users, admin, delivery, etc.) and mixing in blob storage and authorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: updating ServicesPage to display 6 service categories with sub-items and images, and rendering those 6 sample images as static assets.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each hook, page, and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Nellore Print Hub' and mounting the React root at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application file that configures TanStack Router with all public, admin, and customer routes, and wraps the app with ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, LanguageProvider, and CustomerAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks for a valid admin session (email/password session storage or Internet Identity) and redirects to login or setup if the user is not authorized.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Reusable component that renders English and Telugu text together, supporting both vertical stacking and inline side-by-side display modes.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A mobile-only bottom navigation bar with six tabs (Home, Services, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact, Chat) that highlights the active route and supports i18n via LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A reusable bottom sheet modal component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll while open, and renders an optional title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet listing options with checkmarks, triggering haptic feedback on selection and calling an onValueChange callback.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that displays a conversation thread for authenticated users, allows sending messages via the useSendMessage hook, and shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when the customer is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu using LanguageContext, with haptic feedback on press.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sticky header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, a footer with contact info, a scroll-to-top button, and a BottomNav for mobile.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: An Internet Identity login/logout button that handles authentication state, shows a loading spinner during login, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, differentiating sides with icons and alignment.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for first-time users to enter their name, email, and mobile number, which is saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during the pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app's URL and description.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by translating its children along the X-axis in response to touch gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: Provides a React context for customer authentication, persisting session data (customerId and identifier) in localStorage with login and logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for language selection (English/Telugu), persisting the choice in localStorage and exposing a translation lookup function `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to check whether the currently authenticated Internet Identity caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin email/password credentials by hashing the password with SHA-256 before calling the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and updating admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin users exist in the backend by querying the admin user count.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for listing existing admin invitations and creating new ones by hashing the password before sending to the backend.
Provides hooks for registering the first admin via Internet Identity principal and for seeding the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppName.ts: Provides React Query hooks to get and set the application name via the backend actor, with a 5-minute stale time and cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutations for biometric login and registration using WebAuthn, verifying device support and registering credentials with the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history for specific customers.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the company logo stored as an ExternalBlob via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to retrieve and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor with a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Provides a query hook to fetch all quotation requests for a specific customer by their ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate delivery fees by distance, and update delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to submit a negotiation response for a quotation, invalidating related quotation query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the office location via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, including fetching all projects or by category, and adding, editing, or deleting projects via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a distance threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch the reply file (ExternalBlob) associated with a specific quotation ID via the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook to handle quotation responses (status updates with optional messages) via the backend actor, invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides React Query hooks for quotation CRUD operations including fetching all/my quotations, getting details, creating, adding details, approving, and managing customer-pending status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook to fetch quotation counts grouped by status from the backend actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all reviews, filter reviews by rating, and add a new review through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete service images via the backend actor, invalidating the serviceImages cache on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that detects horizontal touch swipes and navigates between a predefined set of page routes using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch the current caller's user profile and save/update it via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and delete video clips via the backend actor, invalidating the videoClips cache on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for a deep teal and gold printing theme with both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wraps the backend ExternalBlob class to provide a typed frontend interface for creating blobs from URLs or bytes, retrieving bytes or direct URLs, and tracking upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query, InternetIdentity authentication, and global CSS providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with a hero section, a grid of company benefit cards, and a commitment section, all using i18n translations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: Admin page protected by AdminGuard that loads and saves the About page custom text content via useGetAdminContent and useUpdateAdminContent hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard displaying quotation statistics in stat cards and a grid of navigation links to all admin management sections, with logout functionality.
Admin login page supporting three authentication methods: Internet Identity, email/password, and biometric login. Handles session storage, query invalidation, and navigation to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration page with a form for creating a new admin account via email and password, including validation and redirect to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page that lists existing admin users and provides a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password credentials.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AppNameManageme: Admin page for viewing and updating the application name, with validation, success/error feedback, and a back button to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing business hours per day of the week, allowing open/close time edits or marking days as closed, with save functionality backed by admin content hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page for viewing and responding to customer chat messages, grouping them by customer email with expandable conversation threads and reply functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving business contact details (email, phone, address, maps link) using admin content hooks with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing, allowing admins to set per-km rate and minimum fee (stored in paise, displayed in rupees) with bilingual support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text content, with a textarea input and bilingual English/Telugu labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and managing the company logo, supporting file selection with size/type validation, upload progress tracking, and preview display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads, category selection, and an add/edit dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, with expandable cards showing quotation details, status badges, and actions to mark as customer-pending or accept payment.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service images and video clips, with tabs to add/delete media items by service type using URL inputs.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with company contact info cards (phone, email, address) and a message submission form that calls the backend actor's sendMessage method.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email/mobile and SHA-256-hashed password against the backend actor, then redirects to the customer portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard displaying the logged-in customer's quotations with status badges, progress bars, and navigation to quotation details.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, and calls the backend actor to create a new account.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing information (per-km rate and minimum fee) fetched from the backend, and provides an interactive calculator where users can input a distance to estimate their delivery fee.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page showcasing the print shop's services, sample images, features, and a hero section with the dynamic app name, navigating users to relevant sections.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists a customer's quotation requests with status badges and expandable detail sections showing price, description, terms, and downloadable reply files, with support for customer approval actions.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable masonry-style gallery of completed projects categorized by service type, with a modal for viewing project details.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: A confirmation screen shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps, with navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
A form page for customers to submit a new print quotation request, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status, then navigating to the confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer-facing page listing their quotations with options to accept, reject, negotiate price, or approve payment, fetching quotation details and rendering status badges and negotiation history per card.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders a static services catalog page listing six print service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen, offset) with images, descriptions, and navigation to request a quotation.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form page for authenticated customers to submit a star-rated review with name, text, project type, and optional image upload, then navigates to the testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Shows a paginated, filterable grid of customer reviews with star-rating filters, pull-to-refresh support, and a button to navigate to the submit-review page; requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: Defines all English UI string translations for the Nellore Print Hub app, covering navigation, services, quotation forms, statuses, and customer portal labels.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a `getTranslations` helper that returns the correct translation map based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Defines all Telugu UI string translations for the Nellore Print Hub app, mirroring the keys in the English translation file.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Provides haptic feedback utilities using the browser Vibration API, with named patterns for tap, success, error, and selection events.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering credentials, authenticating users, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom CSS-variable-based colors (teal, gold, ink, paper), brand fonts, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3 for a printing and design services app, documenting existing features, new feature requests, image requirements, and architectural notes for a 6-category services page.
